task_completion.description: The 'sample_order_lines2023' dataset is loaded into Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data panel on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface displays 'sample_order_lines2023' as the active dataset.

task_completion.description: A Bar Chart visualization is created using 'Sales' and 'Region'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Bar Chart is visible on the canvas. The grammar/properties panel for this chart shows 'Sales' assigned to the Y-axis/Values and 'Region' (or an auto-enriched geographic equivalent) assigned to the X-axis/Category.

task_completion.description: A Language Narrative visualization is created using 'Sales' and 'Region'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text-based Language Narrative visualization is visible on the canvas. The grammar panel for this visualization shows 'Sales' and 'Region' (or an auto-enriched equivalent) added as data inputs.

task_completion.description: Both visualizations are arranged together on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dashboard canvas simultaneously displays both the Bar Chart and the Language Narrative visualization side-by-side or stacked.

task_completion.description: The workbook is saved as 'Augmented_Summary' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box shows the filename 'Augmented_Summary' and the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents', OR the top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop application displays 'Augmented_Summary' indicating it has been saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to build the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor clicking through Oracle Analytics menus, dragging and dropping columns, and configuring visualizations, rather than terminal commands generating the .dva file.

integrity.description: The visualizations are genuinely rendered by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The charts and narrative text appear within the standard Oracle Analytics Desktop canvas UI with appropriate rendering, tooltips, and grammar panels, not as pasted images or text files.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog within Oracle Analytics Desktop being used, rather than a script moving or creating a dummy file in the Documents folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Note: The raw dataset 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' contains a 'Sales' column, but the 'Region' column does not explicitly exist. The agent must rely on Oracle Analytics' auto-enrichment or derive a geographic equivalent to fulfill the 'Region' requirement. Accept any derived/enriched geographic column used in place of 'Region'. The final expected output is a workbook saved as 'Augmented_Summary.dva' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents' containing both a 'bar' chart and a 'narrative' visualization.
